case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY VS. JULLANEY DONALDSON et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DONALDSON, JULLANEY
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DONALDSON, JULLANEY DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-20-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-05-2013
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DONALDSON, JULLANEY
DECLARATION RE: INABILITY OF PLAINTIFF TO FILE ACTION IN SMALL CLAIM COURT: PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONALDSON, JULLANEY $2,986.68 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,286.68, SEE SCANNED DOC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED OCT-18-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DONALDSON, JULLANEY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-20-2013 CONTINUED TO JAN-22-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-19-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
